title: cucurbitaceae
intro: The Cucurbitaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomical grouping that comprises a diverse range of plants commonly known as gourds and cucumbers, including melons, squash, and pumpkins. This family is characterized by its distinctive flowers, which are typically unisexual and have a unique characteristic of having separate male and female reproductive structures. Cucurbitaceae is one of the largest and most economically important families of flowering plants, with many species cultivated worldwide for their edible fruits and vegetables.
